mapper.sql: s.id, s.name, s.email, s.phone, s.address, s.birthdate, s.gender, s.status, s.chat_username, s.referral_source_id, rs.name AS referral_source_name, rs.category AS referral_source_category, s.created_at, s.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.course_id, c.name AS course_name, e.start_date, e.end_date, e.status FROM enrollments e INNER JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.id WHERE e.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY e.created_at DESC, e.id DESC

SELECT p.id, p.enrollment_id, c.name AS course_name, p.amount, p.due_date, p.paid_date, p.status FROM payments p INNER JOIN enrollments e ON p.enrollment_id = e.id INNER JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.id WHERE p.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students ( name, email, phone, address, birthdate, gender, status, chat_username, referral_source_id ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{birthdate}, #{gender}, #{status}, #{chatUsername}, #{referralSourceId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, birthdate = #{birthdate}, gender = #{gender}, chat_username = #{chatUsername}, referral_source_id = #{referralSourceId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM students WHERE id = #{id})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM students WHERE email = #{email})

SELECT ( EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM enrollments WHERE student_id = #{id}) OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM payments WHERE student_id = #{id}) OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM hearing_answers WHERE student_id = #{id}) OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM mail_histories WHERE student_id = #{id}) )
